prompt: Create a luminous fantasy anime-style illustration of three ethereal white-rose characters in a sun-drenched garden. The scene shows exactly 3 figures: a tall serene long-haired adult man standing in the back left wearing a pale lavender-white kimono with layered robes and ornate belt details; a central young princess-like woman in a sleeveless white floral wedding dress with pearl chains, lace, translucent petal-like ribbons, and white roses on her bodice and in her short dark hair, arms raised outward as if dancing or blessing the garden; and a smaller blond boy on the lower right in an elegant white ceremonial outfit, looking upward toward the central woman. Cover each character’s face with a flat opaque beige-pink square censor block, exactly 3 square blocks total, one per face. Surround them with abundant blooming white roses, glowing petals, floating translucent ribbons, glittering dust, and strong backlit sunlight from the upper right, creating a dreamy overexposed pastel atmosphere. Use a vertical 4:5 canvas, highly detailed AI anime illustration style, soft lavender, ivory, pearl white, champagne gold, and pale blue tones, with romantic magical realism and intricate floral ornamentation. Add visible white watermark-style text across the lower center: “©ImaginaryGate | ProjectMRA | Mai”, and a cursive date/signature line beneath it reading “2026.6.3 Koyo&Asu&Lucca”. Include a faint oversized semi-transparent “ImaginaryGate” watermark across the middle. The overall mood should be angelic, nostalgic, radiant, and bridal, like a white rose princess celebration in a magical greenhouse.
